idea-plugin.name: EntropyGuard
idea-plugin.description:
EntropyGuard — AI Code Entropy Detection

Detect structural disorder in your codebase before it compounds. EntropyGuard analyzes in-progress code changes in real-time to identify how AI-generated code introduces hidden entropy—structural disorder that increases over time without obvious failure.

Why EntropyGuard?

AI-generated code is not broken—it gradually increases system entropy. EntropyGuard detects this hidden structural degradation, helping developers maintain codebase health and prevent technical debt from compounding silently.

Key Features

  • - Real-time Entropy Detection - Analyze code changes as you type
  • - Entropy Scoring - Get instant entropy scores for your code modifications
  • - Security Detection - Identify potential security vulnerabilities
  • - Code Quality Insights - Receive suggestions for code improvements
  • - Inline Feedback - See issues directly in your editor
  • - Comprehensive Reports - Detailed analysis reports with findings
  • - Performance Analysis - Detect performance bottlenecks and inefficiencies
  • - Best Practices - Ensure adherence to coding standards

Supported Technologies

  • Languages: Java (full AST analysis), Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and more (diff-based analysis)
  • Frameworks: Spring, React, Angular, Vue.js, Django, Flask
  • Build Tools: Maven, Gradle, npm, yarn, pip
  • IDE Integration: IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3+ (Community & Ultimate)

Getting Started

  1. Install the Plugin: Install from JetBrains Marketplace
  2. Enable Analysis: The plugin automatically starts analyzing your code changes
  3. View Results: Check the EntropyGuard tool window for analysis results
  4. Review Findings: Click on issues to see detailed explanations and suggestions

Technical Information

  • Architecture: Built on IntelliJ Platform with advanced AI analysis engines
  • Analysis: Real-time static and dynamic code analysis
  • Compatibility: Works with IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3+ (Community & Ultimate)
  • AI Integration: Powered by state-of-the-art machine learning models

Free vs Premium

  • Free: 7 day trial
  • Premium: unlimited usage

action.description: Run AI code risk analysis on the current file
Run comprehensive AI risk analysis on the entire project

idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0 - 2026-04-30
  • Renamed plugin to EntropyGuard
  • Added detection of corrupted source files as a new top-level category
  • Improved detection of common AI duplication signals
  • Improved detection of common AI security anti-patterns
  • Got code generator tool 100% working
1.0.3 - 2026-04-25
  • Added new improved icon
  • Fixed licensing to correctly use IntelliJ Marketplace Trial API
  • Fixed code generator compilation issues
  • Added support for aichat, llm, and ollama CLI tools
1.0.2 - 2026-04-17
  • Disabled MCP server (temporarily)
  • Click to jump to problem files
  • UI layout improvements
1.0.1 - 2026-04-14
  • General improvements and bug fixes
1.0.0 - 2026-04-12
  • Initial release to IntelliJ Marketplace
  • Real-time code risk analysis
  • Security vulnerability detection
  • Code quality insights and suggestions
  • Inline editor feedback
  • Dedicated tool window for analysis results
